{
  "recipe_name": "Spaghetti Aglio e Olio (modified)",
  "ingredients": ["500g spaghetti", "4-6 garlic cloves, thinly sliced", "1/3 cup (80ml) extra virgin olive oil"],
  "steps": [
    "Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.",
    "In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-low heat. Add the thinly sliced garlic and cook for 4-5 minutes or until golden brown and fragrant, stirring occasionally.",
    "Add the reserved pasta water to the skillet with the garlic and oil mixture. Toss the cooked spaghetti in the skillet, coating it evenly with the garlic-infused oil. Season with salt to taste."
  ],
  "tips": "Traditionally, this recipe does not include any additional seasonings or ingredients beyond garlic and olive oil. However, you can add some red pepper flakes for a spicy kick if desired."
